contact.title: Contact - Travel Blog

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: I'd love to hear from fellow travelers and share experiences!
contact.name: Name
contact.aboutText:
Hi! I'm Alex, a passionate traveler and blogger based in Seoul. I've been exploring the world for over 8 years, visiting more than 30 countries across Asia, Europe, and the Americas.

I started this blog to share my travel experiences, tips, and stories with fellow adventurers. Whether you're planning your first solo trip or you're a seasoned traveler looking for hidden gems, I hope my content inspires and helps you on your journey.

When I'm not traveling, you can find me exploring local cafes in Seoul, learning new languages, or planning my next adventure.
contact.interestsList: Solo Travel, Food Tourism, Cultural Experiences, Photography, Budget Travel, Adventure Sports, Local Markets, Historical Sites

cta.title: Let's Connect!
cta.description: Whether you have travel questions, collaboration ideas, or just want to share your own travel stories, I'd love to hear from you.
